correction_C_energy_normalization.fidelity_caveat: Re-election reproduces persisted v_level at 85% (322/378); the 15% gap is propagate_vlevel_per_typeid + DB triggers applied AFTER election. An EXACT C simulation on other gammes requires replaying the full pipeline (election + propagate), not a simple re-election. Moot here (C=0 on 402).

correction_A_v5_union.rule: V5 = siblings (same modele_parent, root-skip) + ENFANTS (modele_parent = classified model). Precedence: searched level > V5; 1 type_id = 1 level.

Union adds 189 ADD_CANDIDATE. NOT a mass removal. The ~26 same-model V5 = rule ambiguity -> owner decision (never auto-remove). Children candidates = zero-demand -> thin-content R8 risk.
